title: Sex identification PCR-RFLP assay tested in eight species of Sebastes rockfish
author: Vaux, Felix
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Files for 'Sex identification PCR-RFLP assay tested in eight species of  Sebastes  rockfish'. Files include a sampling spreadsheet for eight species of  Sebastes  rockfish, and a .fasta file of DNA sequences for a male and female from each species for the Sch.182255-210250 locus.
steps_raw: Files for 'Sex identification PCR-RFLP assay tested in eight species of  Sebastes  rockfish'. Files include a sampling spreadsheet for eight species of  Sebastes  rockfish, and a .fasta file of DNA sequences for a male and female from each species for the Sch.182255-210250 locus.
